title: How to make homemade animal-based sunscreen

chunks.title: Introduction to Animal-Based Sunscreen
chunks.summary: The video begins with an introduction to homemade animal-based sunscreen, emphasizing its superiority over traditional sunscreens. The creator explains their personal routine of using this sunscreen while surfing and presents the goal of the video: to show how to make this alternative sunscreen.

chunks.summary: The creator lists the key ingredients for the homemade sunscreen, which include tallow, beeswax, zinc oxide, and coconut oil. There is a discussion about the safety of these ingredients, indicating that they are safe enough to be edible and beneficial for the skin.

chunks.title: The Dangers of Traditional Sunscreens
chunks.summary: A critical overview of traditional sunscreens follows, where the creator highlights harmful ingredients commonly found in these products, such as octobenzone and avobenzone. They emphasize the health risks associated with these compounds, including their potential links to cancer.
